  Log:
  SSSPL - Simple Socks Server for Perl
  
  SSS is a simple socks server written in perl that
  implements the SOCKS v5 protocol.
  
  WWW:    http://sourceforge.net/projects/ssspl/
  
  PR:             ports/156398
  Submitted by:   Hung-Yi Chen <gaod@hychen.org>
